# GoalOS AGIJobManager Ascension — Proof-Conditioned Router Observatory v30

Status: PASS.

## Purpose

v30 adds a browser-local public demonstration of proof-conditioned routing. The page teaches that a GoalOS institution should not maximize the number of agents; it should select the smallest sufficient, validator-bound constellation for the mission.

## Public route

`/proof-conditioned-router-observatory.html`

## Public data contract

`/proof-conditioned-router-observatory-demo.json`

## Core message

Route the institution, not the swarm.

## Implementation files

- `site/proof-conditioned-router-observatory.html`
- `site/assets/router-observatory.css`
- `site/assets/router-observatory.js`
- `data/proof-conditioned-router-observatory-demo.json`
- `schemas/proof-conditioned-router-observatory.schema.json`
- `docs/PROOF_CONDITIONED_ROUTER_OBSERVATORY_V30.md`
- `tests/proof-conditioned-router-observatory.test.mjs`
- `tools/proof-conditioned-router-observatory-kernel.mjs`

## Safety posture

No account, form tag, cookies, analytics, localStorage, sessionStorage, wallet connection, network request, token route, transaction broadcast, production authority, or user data collection.

## Verification

Local verification covered source-file presence, JS syntax, route/data build output, router-family markers, hard gates, downloadable receipt marker, ascendant particles, and forbidden primitive scans.
